prompt: Create a realistic fashion travel photo of a young adult woman with long wavy brown hair sitting on the stone ledge beside the turquoise water of the Trevi Fountain in Rome, with the ornate white Baroque fountain facade, statues, columns, carved stone, and surrounding narrow cobblestone streets visible in the background under a vivid blue sky with scattered white clouds. She is posed leaning back on one hand with both legs extended diagonally toward the camera, giving a wide-angle street-photography perspective. Her face is intentionally obscured with a smooth rectangular blur while the rest of the scene remains sharp and natural. Outfit: exactly 7 visible gothic fashion elements — 1 black puff-sleeve lace-trim peplum top with a silver cross-like ornamental design on the chest, 1 layered black choker, 1 long black beaded necklace with cross pendants, 1 pair of distressed black denim shorts with straps and metal rings, 1 black studded wrist cuff, 1 pair of tall slouchy black leather boots, and 1 set of dark bracelets on the opposite wrist. Use bright midday natural light, crisp architectural detail, realistic skin and fabric textures, shallow but readable background depth, high-resolution editorial travel style, vertical 4:5 composition, no text, no watermark, no extra people in the foreground.
